name: Supplier Performance Total Cost of Ownership
description: Industrial-grade TCO model for supplier evaluation incorporating quality, logistics, and lifecycle costs per ISO 14040, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Purchase Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Negotiated unit price from supplier contract.

businessContext_i18n.en: Negotiated unit price from supplier contract.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Parts per million defective, Six Sigma metric.

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts per million defective, Six Sigma metric.

inputs.label: Inspection Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of incoming quality inspection per unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of incoming quality inspection per unit.

inputs.label: Freight Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average shipping cost per unit from supplier.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average shipping cost per unit from supplier.

inputs.label: Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Supplier lead time from order to delivery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Supplier lead time from order to delivery.

inputs.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inventory holding cost as percentage of unit cost (Lean metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual inventory holding cost as percentage of unit cost (Lean metric).

inputs.label: Warranty Claim Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units that result in warranty claims.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units that result in warranty claims.

inputs.label: Average Warranty Claim Cost
inputs.businessContext: Average cost per warranty claim (labor, parts, logistics).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost per warranty claim (labor, parts, logistics).

inputs.label: Supplier Quality Level
inputs.businessContext: Qualitative assessment of supplier quality management system (ISO 9001).

businessContext_i18n.en: Qualitative assessment of supplier quality management system (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Include Environmental Cost
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include estimated carbon and waste disposal costs (ISO 14040).

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include estimated carbon and waste disposal costs (ISO 14040).

inputs.label: CO2 Emissions per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Estimated carbon footprint per unit from supplier operations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated carbon footprint per unit from supplier operations.

inputs.label: Carbon Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable carbon tax or internal carbon price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable carbon tax or internal carbon price.

rules.message: Defect rate must be between 0 and 100,000 ppm.
Carrying cost rate must be between 0% and 100%.
If environmental cost is included, CO2 and carbon tax must be non-negative.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 1000 ppm; consider supplier quality improvement (Six Sigma).
TCO per unit exceeds 150% of purchase price; review supplier performance.
Lead time exceeds 60 days; risk of inventory stockout (Lean JIT).

formulas.label: Quality Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Cost of defects including inspection and rework (Six Sigma COPQ).

formulas.label: Logistics Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Freight and inventory carrying cost based on lead time.

formulas.label: Environmental Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Carbon tax and waste disposal cost (ISO 14040).

formulas.label: Total Cost of Ownership per Unit
formulas.description: Primary TCO metric combining all cost drivers.

formulas.label: Annual Total Cost of Ownership
formulas.description: Total annual cost based on quantity.

formulas.label: TCO Performance Index
formulas.description: Normalized index comparing TCO to purchase price (1.0 = baseline).

primary.label: Annual Total Cost of Ownership
primary.description: Primary result: total annual cost including all hidden drivers.

qualityCost.label: Quality Cost
qualityCost.description: Annual cost of defects and inspection.

logisticsCost.label: Logistics Cost
logisticsCost.description: Annual freight and inventory carrying cost.

environmentalCost.label: Environmental Cost
environmentalCost.description: Annual carbon and waste cost (if included).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Defect Rework & Scrap
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unaccounted cost of internal rework and scrap due to defects.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Expedited Shipping Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Premium freight due to lead time variability.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Supplier Management Overhead
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of procurement and quality audits per supplier.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Six Sigma DMAIC
suggestedActions.description: Target defect rate reduction to <500 ppm to lower quality cost.

suggestedActions.label: Lean JIT Inventory Reduction
suggestedActions.description: Negotiate lead time reduction to 15 days to cut carrying cost.

suggestedActions.label: Root Cause Analysis (RCA)
suggestedActions.description: Reduce warranty claims by 50% through design and process improvements.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: TCO with Confidence Adjustment
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: TCO adjusted for data uncertainty using a confidence factor (0.8-1.0).
